name: Assault Protection
description: Having Extra Health grants +1.80% Weapon Damage per second, up to 10 stacks. Losing all Extra Health removes all stacks.

name: Brainstorm
description: Grants +15% Skill Duration. Grants an additional +15% Skill Duration when within 20 meters of an ally.

name: Combat Inspiration
description: Weapon Critical Hits grant +3.60% Max Health for 10 seconds, up to 10 stacks.

name: Defense Enhancement
description: Gaining Extra Health grants +7% Armor for 10 seconds, up to 5 stacks.

name: Double-edged Bullet
description: Having Extra Health grants +18% Damage and -20% Damage Reduction.

name: Electrical Protection
description: Having Extra Health grants +1.80% Skill Intensity per second, up to 10 stacks. Losing all Extra Health removes all stacks.

name: Emergency Measures
description: Taking damage restores 50% Max Health when Health is below 20%. Talent Cooldown: 30 seconds.

name: Explosive Burst
description: Throwing a Grenade grants +9% Skill Multi-shot Chance for 2 seconds, up to 10 stacks. Talent Cooldown: 3 seconds.

name: Explosive Fury
description: Throwing a Grenade grants +18% Rate of Fire for 10 seconds, up to 2 stacks. Talent Cooldown: 3 seconds.

name: Hidden Impact
description: Grants +18% Weapon Critical Hit Chance when behind cover for at least 3 seconds.

name: Injured Taunt
description: Hits taken grant +1.80% Damage Reduction for 10 seconds, up to 10 stacks.

name: Inspiration
description: Grants +30% Rate of Fire when Skills are deployed.

name: Intense Performance
description: Grants +33% Skill Radius but also inflicts -5% Skill Duration.

name: Meditation
description: Grants +3.60% Skill Critical Hit Chance per second while immobile, up to 5 stacks. Movement removes 1 stacks per second.

name: Minion Training
description: Skill Critical Hit Kills grant +36% Skill Critical Hit Damage for 12 seconds.

name: Open Fire
description: Deploying the Signature Ability grants +20% Optimal Range and +36% Magazine Size for 12 seconds.

name: Overwatch
description: Grants +15% Skill Damage when behind cover for at least 3 seconds.

name: Painkillers
description: Using a Medical Kit grants +9% Damage Reduction for 8 seconds, up to 2 stacks.

name: Prime Engineer
description: Deploying a Skill at full Health grants +22.50% Engineering for 12 seconds.

name: Rescue Protection
description: Rescuing a downed ally grants all allies within 40 meters Extra Health equal to 12.50% Max Health for 10 seconds.

name: Rock Solid
description: Receiving Healing grants +15% Damage Reduction for 3 seconds.

name: Siege
description: Grants Extra Health equal to 37.50% Max Health for 15 seconds when 2 enemies are within 20 meters. Talent Cooldown: 30 seconds.

name: Simple Pleasures
description: Healing grants +4% Weapon Damage for 5 seconds, up to 3 stacks.

name: Street Fighter
description: Grants +5% Damage Reduction while within 20 meters of an enemy. Grants +15% Weapon Critical Hit Chance for 5 seconds when an enemy dies within 20 meters.

name: Unstoppable
description: Kills grant +5% Weapon Damage for 10 seconds, up to 3 stacks.
